Issues: Lack of High Detail/Complexity: The image is very flat and stylized. While this can be a style choice, it limits its appeal to high-end prints or licensing, as commercial buyers often seek intricate details.
Compositional Simplicity: The composition is a standard landscape. It lacks a unique focal point or complex visual narrative that would immediately distinguish it in a crowded market.
Print Quality Concerns: The digital rendering, while colorful, appears somewhat simplistic, which might lead to poor resolution or poor texture when printed at high resolution.
Commercial Appeal: The image relies on a very common theme (sunset/landscape). Without a unique artistic signature or highly refined technique, its commercial appeal is moderate.
